channel.title: Pigsty – Category: ADMIN
channel.description: Recent content in Category: ADMIN on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: pg_repack
item.description:
Overview

PGDG 1st Party Extension: pg_repack : Reorganize tables in PostgreSQL databases with minimal locks

Information

  • ID: 4010
  • Name: pg_repack
  • Alias: pg_repack
  • Category: ADMIN
  • Website: https://github.com/reorg/pg_repack
  • License: BSD 3 License
  • Language: C
  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 1.5.0
  • PG Vers: 16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PGDG
  • RPM Name: pg_repack_$v*
  • RPM Ver : 1.5.0
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PGDG
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-repack
  • DEB Ver : 1.5.0
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details

item.title: Docs: pg_squeeze
item.description:

  • Comment: 无

  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create

item.title: Docs: pgdd
item.description:
Overview

PIGSTY 3rd Party Extension: pgdd : An in-database data dictionary providing database introspection via standard SQL query syntax. Developed using pgx (https://github.com/zombodb/pgx).

Information

  • ID: 4050
  • Name: pgdd
  • Alias: pgdd
  • Category: ADMIN
  • Website: https://github.com/rustprooflabs/pgdd
  • License: MIT License
  • Language: Rust
  • Tags: pgrx
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 0.5.2
  • PG Vers: 16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Relocatable
  • Trusted: Trusted, Can be created by user with CREATE Privilege
  • Schemas: dd
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PIGSTY
  • RPM Name: pgdd_$v
  • RPM Ver : 0.5.2
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PIGSTY
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-pgdd
  • DEB Ver : 0.5.2
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details
